Name: Jasper PLD Events
Description: General-purpose Paladin event profile for PvE. Broken references and field-content-specific events were removed for stable roulette and raid use.

Events.Name: Sheltron
Events.Description:
Auto uses holy sheltron under 85HP when 95+ gauge to never overcap. 
CONFLICTS WITH BUDDYMIT.

Events.Name: Boss Hold
Events.Description:
Holds Cooldowns at 15% boss HP. 
Reccomended to use this for the first two dungeon bosses.

Events.Name: Group Hold
Events.Description:
Holds cooldowns at 40% HP, in packs greater than 3. 
Reccomended to toggle this manually before AOE during dungeons for best results.

Events.Name: Auto Buddymit
Events.Description: Automatically gives Intervention to cotank at 80%. This HP value is adjustable in conditions.

Events.Name: Stance
Events.Description: Tank stance helper for synced dungeons and roulettes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Paladin ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Conditions.Name: Stance
Conditions.Description: Tank stance helper for synced duties.

Logics.Name: Stance
Logics.Description: Tank stance helper for synced dungeons and roulettes.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Paladin ACR toggles while safely out of combat.
